node.statement: 1 in A_+: by node 1.1, 1 in A=Im P. By GT-jb-orderunit-3310, V=B(H)_sa is a complete order-unit space with order unit 1; by GT-orderunit-def an order unit e of an order-unit space lies in the cone (e in A^+), hence 1 in V_+. Therefore 1 in A cap V_+ = A_+ (def-near-fixed-algebra, order/cone inherited exactly).
